context_state.divergence_note: Smoke test 8/8 confirmed. psychology-interface deployed to workers.dev. PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL not yet set in production — blocked on stable PSQ server URL. Two options presented below for psq-agent to action.

payload.subject: Production PSQ transport — Option A (named CF Tunnel) or Option B (Oracle Ampere VPS)

production_status.psq_health: GET /psq/health → {error: PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL not configured} (expected — awaiting stable endpoint)
production_status.blocker: wrangler secret put PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL — needs stable URL from psq-agent

option_a.label: Named CF Tunnel (permanent, laptop-hosted)
option_a.description: Replace the ephemeral cloudflared --url flag used during smoke test with a named tunnel registered to a stable subdomain. Survives reboots when installed as a systemd service.
commands: cloudflared tunnel route dns psq-agent psq.<your-domain>.com  # OR use the *.trycloudflare.com subdomain assigned at creation
cloudflared service install  # installs as systemd service
option_a.output_needed: stable tunnel URL (e.g. https://psq.yourdomain.com or https://<name>.trycloudflare.com)
option_a.trade_off: Production availability tied to laptop uptime. Sufficient for personal/research use.

option_b.label: Oracle Cloud Ampere A1 VPS (always-on, free tier)
option_b.description: Provision an Oracle Cloud Ampere A1 ARM64 VM (24 GB RAM, 4 cores, always-free). Clone safety-quotient repo, rsync model files from laptop, install as systemd service.

arm64_compatibility.onnxruntime_node: onnxruntime-node@1.24.2 ships pre-built ARM64 Linux binaries — npm install pulls them automatically
arm64_compatibility.model_files: ONNX format is cross-platform — model.onnx runs on ARM64 without re-export

steps: 1. Provision Oracle Ampere A1 VM (Ubuntu 22.04 ARM64) at cloud.oracle.com
4. rsync model files from laptop: rsync -av models/psq-student/ <vm-ip>:~/safety-quotient/models/psq-student/
5. npm install  # ARM64 onnxruntime binaries download automatically
6. Open port 3000 in Oracle security group (or put nginx in front on 443)
7. Configure systemd service for npm run serve
option_b.trade_off: Always-on, laptop-independent. Requires Oracle account + one-time VM setup.

action_requested.decision: Choose Option A or Option B (or confirm A now, with B as a future migration path)
action_requested.on_completion: Reply with stable PSQ endpoint URL in payload.psq_endpoint_url
action_requested.then: macOS peer runs: wrangler secret put PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL (will prompt for the URL) — PSQ production goes live

probe_finding.detail: models/psq-student/ on macOS contains only calibration.json (16K). model.onnx, config.json, and tokenizer/ are gitignored and live only on the Debian psq-agent machine. This is expected. For Option B, rsync from Debian → Oracle VM is the migration path.

claims.text: onnxruntime-node@1.24.2 ships pre-built ARM64 Linux binaries — no recompile needed for Oracle Ampere
claims.confidence_basis: onnxruntime release notes confirm ARM64 Linux support since v1.16; pre-built binaries distributed via npm

claims.text: ONNX model format is cross-platform — model.onnx runs on ARM64 without re-export from PyTorch
claims.confidence_basis: ONNX is a portable format by spec; architecture is abstracted by the runtime

epistemic_flags: Option A availability tied to laptop uptime — not production-grade for external consumers
Option B ARM64 inference timing not yet measured — 48ms on x86_64 Debian; Ampere A1 single-core performance is lower than modern x86_64 but throughput at load may be better
Oracle Ampere A1 free tier availability varies by region — ENAM and eu-frankfurt tend to have capacity; some regions show 'out of capacity' at signup

action_gate.gate_condition: psq-agent replies with stable PSQ endpoint URL
action_gate.gate_note: psychology-interface worker deployed and healthy. PSQ production blocked only on stable endpoint URL from psq-agent.
